name: Kelly leather wallet
description:
Description: This is a gorgeous Hermes Kelly To Go "Vert Criquet" Green Epsom Leather Verso "Bleu Brume" Wallet Crossbody Strap GHW. The wallet features a front flap, signature Kelly gold plated turn-lock, and optional leather shoulder strap. "Vert Criquet" in english translates to Cricket Green which is the perfect pastel green for any occasion. The rare and stunning verso interior is crafted in "Bleu Brume" and opens to a partitioned leather interior with card slots and a zipper compartment.

Designer: Hermes
Stamp: Y
Year: 2020
Color: "Vert Criquet" Pastel Green & "Blue Brume" Pastel Blue
Material: Epsom Leather
Hardware: Gold-Plated
Measurements: Length: 8", Height: 4.5" Width: 1.25", Strap Drop: 20.5"
Item Condition: Pre-Owned. Very Good.
Exterior: Excellent. The epsom exterior leather is in excellent condition with few signs of wear, the base and corners show little signs of wear. There is moderate signs of wear and light scratching on gold hardware (no stickers). Strap has little to no signs of wear.
Interior: Very Good. A few small signs of wear, small mark on upper left corner, light tarnishing on zipper hardware.
Note: Comes with Original Box & Dustbag. Optional Crossbody Strap.

Adore The Couture would like for our customers to remember that most of the items we carry have been previously owned. We carefully check each item before accepting them and make sure to include very detailed pictures and accurate written descriptions, so please check them very carefully and pay particular attention to the sizes and measurements. If you need additional photos, please email us and we will happily take requests.
